nasb.text: You will die in peace; and as spices were burned for your fathers, the former kings who were before you, so they will burn spices for you; and they will lament for you, “Alas, lord!” ’ For I have spoken the word,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: You shall die in peace. And as spices were burned for your fathers, the former kings who were before you, so people shall burn spices for you and lament for you, saying, “Alas, lord!”’ For I have spoken the word, declares the Lord.”

cnv.text: 你必平平安安死去。人怎樣為你的列祖，就是在你以前的君王，焚燒香料，也必照樣為你焚燒香料；人必為你哀悼，說：“哀哉，主上！”’這話是我說的。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 你必安然去世。人们必为你烧香，像为你的先王烧香一样，他们必为你哀悼说，唉，我主啊！’这是我耶和华说的。”
